---
title: "Joanna Angela Cromie"
---

## Joanna Angela Cromie

**Dates:** (5 September 1873- 21 Oct 1957)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

niece of CMY

### Biography

Youngest child of Julian Bargus Yonge, she married, at St. Matthew\'s Bayswater (16 October 1894), as his second wife, Captain Charles Francis Cromie (1858-1907), who had divorced his first wife in 1892.  He had children by his first marriage, including one who was killed in the Russian Revolution. [WWW the son; wills index, she left £637]

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 15th 1901
- Letter from May 2 [1900]
- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- [To the Marchioness of Salisbury, April 4th 1899](../letters/3402_To_the_Marchioness_of_Salisbury.html)
- Letter from June 1st [?1886]
- Letter from July 29th [1885?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from February 21st [1880s?]
- Letter from May 8 th [1876]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
